Purpose

Why I Chose Cyber Security

I chose Cyber Security because I like hacking — not to cause harm, but to understand systems from the inside out.

I want to understand systems, find vulnerabilities, protect digital information, and become a skilled cybersecurity professional.

My goal is to help build a safer digital world — one vulnerability patched at a time.

Think Like A Hacker
